Location

One day from 70% of the U.S.

Champaign sits on three interstates near the Decatur inland port. A congestion free alternative to routing everything through Chicago.

If any of this sounds familiar

You didn't get into business to run a warehouse.

  • You're out of space at the plant, and you don't want to lease a building or hire a warehouse crew.
  • You need to reach retailers and distributors across the country, fast, without building your own DC.
  • Your product is food or feed, and cross contamination or a failed audit isn't an option.
  • You've been burned by a 3PL that went quiet and gave you no visibility into your own inventory.
On the floor · Champaign, IL

You make the product. We handle where it lives and how it moves.

The arrangement

What we are

A managed 3PL. Space, labor, equipment, and systems, run by our team and reporting to yours.

What we're not

Not a building to lease. Not a job board. You bring the product; we do the rest.

Champaign, IL One driving day

The location does the heavy lifting

One day from most of your customers.

From the middle of the country, on three interstates and near the Midwest Inland Port at Decatur, a truck reaches roughly 70% of the U.S. market in a single day. Congestion free, without routing everything through Chicago.

  • Three interstate highways
  • ~70% of the U.S. in 1 day
  • Midwest Inland Port (Decatur)
  • Congestion free vs Chicago

Our services & capabilities

Everything between your line and your customer's dock.

Public & contract warehousing

Flexible space that scales with your season, multi-tenant or dedicated, with no lease and no crew to hire.

Learn more →

Cross-dock & transload

Move freight through, not into storage. In one door, out the next. Dry van, reefer, container, flatbed.

Learn more →

Value added services

Case-pick order fulfillment, kitting, labeling, and EDI straight to the distributors you already sell.

Learn more →

Real time inventory

Camelot 3PL WMS with EDI and API integration, FIFO/LIFO rotation, and automated documentation.

Learn more →
Racked pallet storage Champaign, IL
Open floor space Champaign, IL
Drums, totes & IBC Champaign, IL
ATS facility · Champaign, IL

Built for food & feed

Segregated, audit ready, and rotated right.

Food and feed can't share a room with just anything. Our segregated buildings keep product classes apart, with the pest control, FIFO/LIFO rotation, and lot traceability that keep your audits clean and your recalls rare.

Segregated buildings Pest & contamination control FIFO / LIFO rotation Lot level traceability

Also industrial & general manufacturing: parts, supplies, drums & totes, IBC handling.

Industrial warehousing →

The thing most regional 3PLs can't give you

You'll always know where your product is.

Our Camelot 3PL warehouse management system connects straight to your systems over EDI or API, so your team sees receipts, on hand counts, and shipments without emailing us for a spreadsheet. Real time visibility is standard here, not a premium add on.

EDI 856 / 846 / 940API integrationFIFO / LIFOAutomated documentationCustom reporting
● EDI connectedFIFOLot tracked

How it works

From first call to full visibility, without the drama.

01

Tell us your product

Share what you're storing, your volume, and how it moves in and out. We'll check capacity for your product class.

02

We design the plan

Storage, handling, and shipping mapped to your needs, with EDI and API wired to your systems from day one.

03

Go live with visibility

Product moves in, and your team watches inventory in real time. One partner from the dock to the report.

Meet our team

The same people, in the same place, since 1959.

Three generations of Central Illinois warehousing. When you call ATS, you reach the people who actually handle your product, not a call center three states away. That continuity is why our clients stay for decades.

Meet the team

The space is here.

600,000 square feet across four segregated buildings in Champaign, Illinois. Tell us what you make; we'll tell you where it fits.

Request a capacity check

Let's check our fit

Running low on space, or need to reach more of the country faster?

Tell us what you're storing and how much moves. We'll come back with real numbers on capacity, handling, and what a switch would look like. No pressure, no jargon.
